morning.title: European banking watchdogs ECB and ESRB warn that frontier AI models pose "systemic risks to the financial system"
morning.summary: European banking watchdogs warn that frontier AI models pose systemic risks to the financial system, giving lenders four months to prepare.

morning.title: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off
morning.summary: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off, contradicting the investments of other big tech companies.

morning.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
morning.summary: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are being used in combat in Ukraine, marking a new era in military technology.

morning.title: Your family’s $300 stake in OpenAI

morning.title: Tencent's Apache-licensed Hy3 takes on GLM-5.2 at half the size — and wins everywhere except coding
morning.summary: Tencent's Apache-licensed Hy3 AI model outperforms GLM-5.2 in most areas, despite being half the size, except in coding tasks.

morning.title: What billions of AI predictions taught Expedia before the age of AI agents
morning.summary: Expedia learned valuable lessons from billions of AI predictions, which are now being applied to the development of AI agents.

morning.title: Erling Haaland Is Everywhere at the World Cup. Most of It Is AI
morning.summary: AI-generated images and videos of Erling Haaland are flooding social media during the World Cup, blurring the line between reality and AI-generated content.

morning.title: The best Apple Watch Ultra bands of 2026: Expert tested

morning.title: The Quantum Shift in Biomedical Discovery
morning.summary: IBM is using quantum computing to accelerate biomedical discovery, enabling researchers to analyze vast amounts of data and simulate complex molecular interactions.
